description_long: This skyscraper features a tall, rectangular form with slightly chamfered corners and a dark facade dominated by a regular grid of horizontal and vertical lines, suggesting a curtain wall system. The exterior is clad in dark glass panels framed by light-colored mullions, creating a striking contrast and a modern, corporate appearance. The building has a secondary, narrower volume attached to one side, adding visual interest and breaking up the massing. The roof is flat and unadorned, typical of high-rise office towers. The window pattern is highly regular, with each floor clearly delineated by the grid structure. There are no visible decorative elements or signage, emphasizing a sleek, functional design.
description: A tall, modern skyscraper with a dark glass facade and a regular grid of light mullions, featuring a secondary attached volume and a flat roof.
description_view_0: The main tower is visible with its chamfered corners and attached secondary volume on the left side, highlighting the building's depth.
description_view_1: The front face shows the full width of the main facade, with the grid pattern and a subtle horizontal recess near the top.
description_view_2: The main tower is seen from the opposite angle, with the secondary volume now on the right, emphasizing the building's asymmetry.
description_view_3: A direct view of the main facade, showing the uninterrupted grid of windows and the building's clean, rectangular silhouette.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is composed of dark glass panels set within a precise grid of light-colored mullions, creating a uniform and sleek appearance. The structure is visually defined by its rectilinear geometry and lack of ornamentation.
